description:
Goal: make native lowering helpers consume Compiler2-owned native facts directly. Signal: call-target selection, callable-entry use, extern marshals, yield/receive helpers, and return lanes are resolved from the Compiler2 handoff instead of `SpecPlan`/`AbiFacts` lookups.

Change:
- retarget the native codegen env and lowerers onto Compiler2-native facts
- remove planner-shaped lookup paths from Compiler2’s native backend route
- add fixture coverage for the tricky cases that were previously planner-mediated

Why:
- this is the step that turns the new handoff from documentation into the actual source of truth

Checks:
- quicksort, `Enum.reduce`, variadic externs, and native control-flow fixtures exercise the Compiler2-native paths
- no Compiler2-native codegen path reaches into old planner/type-preparation machinery
title: Compiler2 native backends: retarget lowerers onto Compiler2 native facts
